rows.label: tev055691_MSG0001
rows.name:
Mo! Human city is in
really deep doo-doo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055691_MSG0002
rows.name:
Thankfully, crisis is perfect
time to make big money.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055691_MSG0003
rows.name:
Bigwigs at arms manufacturers sent
Chacha out here to lend helping hand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055691_MSG0004
rows.name:
They even lent AM terminal
and shop terminal to Chacha![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055691_MSG0005
rows.name: Not only that, they deferred payment![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055691_MSG0006
rows.name:
So step right up and buy whatever
friend needs to make Growth go
awaynglion! ...Get it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055691_MSG0010
rows.name:
Step up and buy whatever friend
needs to kick stinky Growth butt![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055691_MSG0011
rows.name:
Full disclosure—Chacha taking
50 percent cut of sales.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055691_MSG0012
rows.name:
But even part-time Nopon
getting 30 credits a day![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055691_MSG0013
rows.name:
So if friend wants to make extra
purchases out of love for Chacha,
Chacha totally understands.[ST:wait ]
